ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Completed, Pending, Delay) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team assigned to the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name or ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the action is associated with */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., Completed, Pending, Delay) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name or ID of the team member assigned to the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name or ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., Designer, Developer, Tester) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the status update is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project at the time of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Project Manager, Team Member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
